title: justicia coahuilana
intro: Justicia coahuilana, also known as the Coahuila snout butterfly plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Justicia coahuilana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe irritated throats, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory ailments. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, and can also be used as a tincture or added to topical creams for skin conditions.
